templates.title: Page Templates
templates.description: Homepage, Documentation, Blog List, Blog Post, and Error Page layouts.

section_patterns.title: Section Patterns
section_patterns.description: Overline section, alternating layout, feature grid, testimonial, CTA.
section_patterns.heading: SECTION HEADING
section_patterns.description_text: Description of this section goes here.
section_patterns.testimonial_quote: "The Endfield design system gave our team a consistent visual language that scales across every deployment."
section_patterns.testimonial_author: OPERATOR CHEN · Lead Engineer, Rhodes Island

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Contrast ratios AAA. ARIA requirements. Skip navigation.

performance.title: Performance Guidelines
performance.description: Images: WebP, lazy loading. Fonts: font-display swap, WOFF2. GPU animations.

tokens.title: Design Tokens (Complete)
tokens.description: Complete CSS variables reference — colors, surfaces, typography, spacing, shadows, transitions, z-index.
tokens.reference_text: See the code block below for the complete reference of all design tokens.

naming.title: Naming Conventions
naming.description: BEM-inspired CSS class naming. Color token naming convention.

behavioral_rules.title: Behavioral Rules
behavioral_rules.description: Overview of invisible interaction contracts from sections 98–111. Use the sub-section links below to navigate to specific rule groups: timing & response, focus management, z-index, scroll behavior, touch targets, form contracts, destructive actions, error recovery, notifications, media queries, consistency standards, sizing matrix, and CLS prevention.

timing_focus.title: §98–100 · Timing, Focus & Z-Index
timing_focus.description: Doherty Threshold timing rules, debounce/throttle patterns, keyboard navigation & focus trap rules, escape overlay hierarchy, and z-index stacking tokens.

scroll_touch_rules.title: §101–102 · Scroll & Touch
scroll_touch_rules.description: Scroll behavior rules for all navigation types, overscroll-behavior utilities, touch target size standards by breakpoint, and safe area CSS variables for iOS notch.

form_action_rules.title: §103–105 · Forms & Actions
form_action_rules.description: Form behavior contracts: disable-on-submit, autosave indicator states, destructive action severity table with undo windows, and error recovery hierarchy with auto-retry backoff.

notification_media.title: §106–107 · Notifications & Media Queries
notification_media.description: Toast notification rules: duration per severity, hover-pause, max visible, position policy. Media query patterns for prefers-reduced-motion, forced-colors, prefers-contrast, and pointer type.

consistency_sizing.title: §108–111 · Standards & Sizing
consistency_sizing.description: Consistency standards for all component types, responsive sizing matrix, link & navigation behavior table, and CLS prevention rules with Core Web Vitals score targets.

auth_layouts.title: Auth Layouts
auth_layouts.description: Recommended layout patterns for authentication pages: split-panel (40% form / 60% visual), centered card, and fullscreen immersive. Responsive — visual panel hidden on mobile.

pricing_tables.title: Pricing Tables
pricing_tables.description: Multi-tier subscription cards with feature lists, recommended badge, and Endfield-styled CTA buttons. Use sharp borders and ◆ feature list icons.

mega_menu.title: Mega Menu
mega_menu.description: Multi-column dropdown navigation for complex content hierarchies. Uses z-index-dropdown (100), Bender font column headers, and ◆ list item bullets.

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.description: Column-based task management UI with status-colored headers, card drag indicators, and + ADD TASK ghost button at column bottom.

language_switcher.title: Language Switcher
language_switcher.description: Active language highlighted with border-primary + bg-primary/8. Integrates with i18next changeLanguage and URL prefix routing.

print_styles.title: Print Styles
print_styles.description: Five utility classes for print control: .print-hidden, .print-only, .print-break-before, .print-break-after, .print-no-break. Already included in index.css.

fab.title: FAB / Chat Widget
fab.description: Diamond-shaped floating action button using clip-path polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%). Fixed positioning with z-index-overlay. Glow on hover.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Threaded comment layout with diamond avatar placeholder, Bender font username, nested replies via border-left indent, and ◆ like counter.

spoiler_tags.title: Spoiler Tags
spoiler_tags.description: SpoilerBlock wraps content in a blur overlay with a [REVEAL CONTENT] button. SpoilerInline hides inline text with the .spoiler CSS class. Both use aria-expanded.

ad_placements.title: Ad Placements
ad_placements.description: Pre-sized ad slot containers (.ad-slot--leaderboard, --sidebar, --in-article) with min-height reservations to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS = 0).

audio_player.title: Audio Player
audio_player.description: Inline audio player with diamond play button, 4px progress track, and Orbitron time display. Optional persistent mini-player (56px sticky bar) for music playback.
